item.title: Shakshuka 🍅🍳 One of my all time favorites Ingredients -R...
item.description:
Shakshuka 🍅🍳 One of my all time favorites Ingredients -Red bell pepper -Onion -Tomatoes (I used a mix of fresh and fire roasted canned tomatoes) -Garlic -Paprika -Coriander -Cumin seeds / ground cumin -Chili powder -Oregano -Salt -Eggs Toppings -Parsley -Mint -Yogurt Serve with some crusty bread or pita!
#cooking #shakshuka #recipe #breakfast
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: CHILI CHEESE BOWL Ingredients Chili Ground beef (80 / 20) 1 ye...
item.description:
CHILI CHEESE BOWL Ingredients Chili Ground beef (80 / 20) 1 yellow onion 1 poblano pepper 1 jalapeño (seeded for mild) Garlic 3 tbsp tomato paste 3 tbsp ancho chili powder or quality chili blend (see homemade recipe below) 1 cup of amber beer or lager OR 4 tbsp dry vermouth 1 can (28 oz / 800 g) fire roasted crushed tomatoes A few chipotle peppers in adobo (adjust to preference) 2 cups beef stock 1 bay leaf 2 cans (15 oz) beans (I used a mix of pinto, red kidney, and black beans) Salt 1 tbsp fresh lime juice Optional: -1-2 tsp brown sugar -1 tsp cocao powder For assembly: Small sourdough boules Unsalted butter Garlic Parsley Shredded cheese such as sharp cheddar or Monterey/Colby Jack) Scallions For the Homemade Chili Blend Toast and grind whole cumin seeds and whole coriander seeds Add: -Mexican oregano -Paprika -Smoked Paprika -Cayenne pepper -Black pepper -Pinch of cinnamon P.S. Feel free to omit the beef for a vegetarian option 😊 P.P.S. You can also deglaze with just stock instead of alcohol
#chili #winter
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: CACIO E PEPE INGREDIENTS -Pecorino Romano -Black peppercorns /...
item.description:
CACIO E PEPE INGREDIENTS -Pecorino Romano -Black peppercorns / freshly cracked black pepper -Spaghetti or bucatini
#pasta #recipe

item.title: Cranberry Swirl Cheesecake with Ingredients For the Cranber...
item.description:
Cranberry Swirl Cheesecake with   Ingredients For the Cranberry–Kefir Swirl -Lifeway Cranberry Crème Brûlée Kefir -Fresh or frozen cranberries -Granulated sugar -Orange zest -Fine salt -Vanilla extract For the Cheesecake Filling -Lifeway Farmer’s Cheese  -Full-fat cream cheese -Granulated sugar -Fine salt -Cornstarch (or all-purpose flour) -Room temperature eggs -Vanilla extract -Lemon zest -Lifeway Cranberry Crème Brûlée Kefir For the Graham Crust -Graham cracker crumbs -Granulated sugar -Fine salt -Unsalted butter  
@Lifeway Kefir #loveyourguts #LifewayLovesYourGuts #DiscoverLifeway
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: Samosas 🇮🇳 Ingredients 1.3 lb (600 g) yukon gold potatoe...
item.description:
Samosas 🇮🇳 Ingredients 1.3 lb (600 g) yukon gold potatoes ½ cup peas (fresh or frozen - if frozen thaw before) 2 Tbsp ghee or oil 1 tsp cumin seeds Pinch of hing (asafoetida), optional 2 tsp finely grated ginger 1–2 green chilies 2 tsp ground coriander 1 tsp ground cumin ½ tsp turmeric ½–1 tsp Kashmiri chili powder ¾–1 tsp garam masala 1–1½ tsp amchur (dry mango powder) or 1–2 tsp lemon juice 1 tsp crushed fenugreek 1.5 tsp salt (to taste) 4 Tbsp chopped cilantro For the Dough 3 cups (360 g) all-purpose flour (or maida flour) 6 Tbsp (75 g) ghee or neutral oil 1 tsp ajwain (carom) seeds 1 tsp salt ~¾ cup room-temperature water To seal 2 teaspoons flour mixed with 2 teaspoons water, or just water   For frying Neutral oil for deep frying
#samosas
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: STEAK SANDWICH🥩 Ingredients For the caramelized onions: -Yell...
item.description:
STEAK SANDWICH🥩 Ingredients For the caramelized onions: -Yellow onions -Butter -Extra virgin olive oil -Salt -Pinch of sugar -Dry white wine or vermouth -Thyme -Beef stock For the spread: -Garlic -Extra virgin olive oil (to confit garlic) -Crème fraîche -Chives -Fresh lemon juice -Sherry vinegar -Dash of horseradish (optional) -Salt -Black pepper For the steak -Ribeye or NY strip -Salt -Pepper -High smoke-point oil (Ie: beef tallow, avocado oil) -Butter -Rosemary -Thyme -Garlic clove To serve: -Baguette or ciabatta -arugula -Gruyère or Comté cheese
#steaksandwich
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: LOBSTER MAC & CHEESE 🦞 Ingredients For the mac and chees...
item.description:
LOBSTER MAC & CHEESE 🦞 Ingredients For the mac and cheese: -Butter -AP Flour -Milk -Heavy Cream -Nutmeg -Paprika -Dijon Mustard -Gruyère -Comte -White cheddar -Yellow cheddar -Parmigiano reggiano -Salt -Black pepper -Cavatappi Pasta For the lobster -Lobster claws & tails -Butter -Garlic -Parsley -Salt -Squeeze of lemon juice To finish -Chives -Toasted breadcrumbs
#macandcheese #lobster #thanksgiving

item.title: The Classic BLT 🥪I’m excited to partner with and to ...
item.description:
The Classic BLT 🥪I’m excited to partner with  and  to bring attention to this injustice. You can’t have the perfect sandwich without mayo! Sign the petition in my bio to join the fight against dry sandwiches everywhere!  Ingredients Hellmann’s / Best Foods mayonnaise Thick-cut bacon Tomato Lettuce (romaine, iceberg, or butter lettuce leaves) Bread (toasted; sourdough, country white, or your preferred sandwich bread) Avocado slices Chives Lemon zest Salt + Black pepper
@Hellmann’s Mayonnaise @bestfoodsmayonnaise #BestFoodsPartner
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: Pide 🇹🇷🧀 INGREDIENTS For the Dough -50/50 All-purpose f...
item.description:
Pide 🇹🇷🧀 INGREDIENTS For the Dough -50/50 All-purpose flour and bread flour -Warm water -Active dry yeast or instant yeast -Sugar -Sea salt -Olive oil For the glaze (optional) -Egg yolk -Plain yogurt -Olive oil For the Ground Lamb Topping (Kıymalı) -Ground lamb -Onion -Green pepper -Red pepper -Tomatoes -Tomato paste (I forgot to film this…) -Parsley -Paprika -Cumin -Aleppo pepper, Urfa pepper, or chili flakes -Salt -Black pepper -Cheese for topping: Kaşar peyniri, beyaz peynir (substitute: mozzarella and feta) Enjoy!
#cooking #turkishfood
